messages.subject: Rent payment reminder for July
messages.body_text:
Hello,

Your July rent payment of $1,850.00 is due by 07/01/2026. Please pay online through the resident portal.

Parkview Residences

messages.subject: Request for Evidence issued
messages.body_text: USCIS has issued a Request for Evidence for your Form I-765. You must respond by September 3, 2026. Review the RFE notice and submit the requested documents.

messages.subject: Your June statement is ready
messages.body_text: Your June statement is ready. Statement balance: $1,243.87. Minimum payment due: $35.00. Payment due date: 07/02/2026.

messages.subject: This week in tech
messages.body_text: This week in tech: our latest roundup published June 21, 2026. Top stories include new framework releases. Read the full issue online.
